backendProcedures: ai.contextChat — accepts { prompt, context: { type, data } }, returns { answer, contextType, provider, model }
ai.proactiveInsights — accepts { clusterId?, criticalAnomalyCount?, criticalAlertCount? }, returns insight summary
byokGate: InlineAiTrigger checks ai.keySettingsStatus — disabled with tooltip if no key configured

contextScoping.anomaly: id, title, description, severity, status, cluster, clusterId, detectedAt
contextScoping.pod: name, namespace, status, nodeName, cpu, memory, restartCount
contextScoping.alert: id, name, metric, operator, threshold, clusterFilter, lastTriggeredAt, lastValue
